name: Baked Spinach and Artichoke Spread
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry
14 ounces artichoke hearts, (canned), drained and chopped
1 tablespoon grated Parmesan cheese, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
OR 9 ounces frozen artichoke hearts
Note: Don't use nonfat Parmesan in this dish. Yield: 2-1/2 cups.
1. Place spinach, artichoke hearts, mayonnaise, mustard, and 1/4 cup plus 1 tablespoon of Parmesan in a medium-sized bowl, and stir to mix well.
2. Coat a 1-quart casserole dish with nonstick cooking spray, and spread the mixture evenly in the dish.
3. Sprinkle the remaining 2 tablespoons of Parmesan over the top.
4. Cover with aluminum foil, and bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes, or until heated through.
5. Remove foil, and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
6. Serve hot, accompanied by a loaf of Italian bread.
Nutritional Information (per tablespoon): Calories 12, Carbs 1.3 g, Cholesterol 1 mg., fat: 0.4 g.
